---
title: "Zorah Matthews"
sortby: "Matthews, Zorah"
subtitle: "Undergrad Project Student"
image: ZorahMatthews.jpg 
started: "Summer 2026"
ended: "current"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---
  
```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
  <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
  <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../labmembers.html">People</a></li>
  <!-- <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Alumni</li> -->
  <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
  </nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}

Zorah Mathews is a second-year Biological Sciences: Genetics and Genomics student with a particular interest in bioinformatics and data analysis. She is currently working on her dissertation project, which investigates the diversity of Lokitandroka spiders in Madagascar. When she's not in the lab, she enjoys swimming, playing tennis, and painting. 

:::
